chunks.text: SORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-1124 of 2025 Date of Hearing ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 27.10.2025. 1. For orders on M.A. No.5640/2025. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on M.A. No.5641/2025. 4. For hearing of Main Case. Mr. Khadim Hussain Khoso, advocate for the petitioner. ------------------------ Petitioner Mst. Raheela Mari has filed an instant petition with multiple prayers, mainly seeking directions to the respondents having their offices at Hyderabad and Mirpurkhas Divisions for demarcation of the agricultural land situated in Taluka Hussain Bux Mari of District Mirpurkhas, which, on the face of it, is not maintainable before this Circuit Court at Larkana. It appears that the office has not raised any objection to this Circuit Court's territorial jurisdiction. When confronted in this regard, learned Counsel, though, has no explanation to offer; however, he does not press the petition and seeks direction to the respondents No.3 & 5 to 7 to decide the application of the petitioner dated 02.10.2025 at the earliest in accordance with law. Be that as it may, since the main grievance raised by the petitioner relates to the landed property in District Mirpurkhas, this Circuit Court lacks territorial jurisdiction to entertain the petition or issue any direction in this regard. Accordingly, the petition being misconceived is dismissed as not pressed along with the listed applications. However, the petitioner can file appropriate proceedings before the forum having jurisdiction, subject to limitations under the law. JUDGE JUDGE
